event: Catherine II at the Coffin of Empress Elizabeth
description: An interior palace scene with dark, heavy curtains and gilded ornamentation. A woman in an elaborate black mourning dress with a red sash stands centrally, facing to the right where a figure in a red military uniform gestures toward a dark curtained area (presumably containing the coffin). Behind the central woman, a group of mourners in black stands at the left. The scene is dimly lit with candlelight from the right, creating dramatic shadows. The atmosphere is one of solemn ceremony and political transition.

_meta.title: Catherine II (1729-96) at the Coffin of Empress Elizabeth (1709-61)
